tagline: Live heart rate overlay for streamers and athletes
description: HypeRate Desktop is a free, open-source desktop application that displays live BPM data as a floating, always-on-top overlay. It connects to the HypeRate platform via WebSocket and works with Apple Watch, Garmin, Polar, Fitbit, Wear OS, Amazfit, and other compatible wearables. Available for macOS, Windows, and Linux.
key_features: Heart rate zones with color coding
